label: 118th Congress Sworn In
description: The 118th United States Congress was sworn in on January 3, 2023.

label: Silicon Valley Bank Collapse
description: Silicon Valley Bank collapsed, triggering regional banking fears.

label: Debt Ceiling Deal Signed
description: Fiscal Responsibility Act signed into law, suspending debt ceiling.

label: Fed Raises Rates to 5.25-5.50%
description: Federal Reserve raised the federal funds rate to 5.25-5.50%.

label: Speaker of the House Elected
description: Mike Johnson elected as Speaker of the House.

label: Fed Signals Rate Cuts in 2024
description: Federal Reserve signaled potential rate cuts in 2024 during December FOMC.

label: Bitcoin ETF Approved
description: SEC approved spot Bitcoin ETFs for trading on U.S. exchanges.

label: TikTok Ban Bill Passes House
description: House passed bill requiring ByteDance to divest TikTok or face ban.

label: AI Safety Framework Introduced
description: Bipartisan AI safety legislation introduced in the Senate.

label: Fed Holds Rates Steady
description: Federal Reserve held rates at 5.25-5.50% for seventh consecutive meeting.
